title: duthiea noctiflora
intro: Duthiea noctiflora, commonly known as the Night-flowering Duthiea, is a plant species within the family Rutaceae. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties. The plant has been associated with several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which may aid in reducing stress and promoting overall well-being. The bioactive constituents of Duthiea noctiflora include flavonoids, limonoids, and terpenoids, which may contribute to its therapeutic actions, including sedation, antispasmodic, and anti-anxiety properties.
